smt2Query:
;
; Sequent:
;
; ⊢
; SNG_Software.Gate.output == SNG_Software.Filter.input &&
;   GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(SNG_Software.Gate.output) ___>:
;   GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(SNG_Software.Filter.input)
;
(set-logic ALL)

(define-sort B () Bool)
(define-fun |B.unary_!| ((x B)) B (not x))
(define-fun |B.unary_~| ((x B)) B (not x))
(define-fun |B.==| ((x B) (y B)) B (= x y))
(define-fun |B.!=| ((x B) (y B)) B (not (= x y)))
(define-fun |B.&| ((x B) (y B)) B (and x y))
(define-fun |B.│| ((x B) (y B)) B (or x y))
(define-fun |B.│^| ((x B) (y B)) B (xor x y))
(define-fun |B.__>:| ((x B) (y B)) B (=> x y))
(define-fun |B.->:| ((x B) (y B)) B (=> x y))

(declare-sort ADT 0)
(declare-sort Type 0)
(declare-fun type-of (ADT) Type)
(declare-fun sub-type (Type Type) Bool)

(assert (forall ((x Type)) (sub-type x x)))
(assert (forall ((x Type) (y Type) (z Type)) (=> (and (sub-type x y) (sub-type y z)) (sub-type x z))))
(assert (forall ((x Type) (y Type)) (=> (and (sub-type x y) (sub-type y x)) (= x y))))

(define-sort Z () Int)
(define-fun |Z.unary_-| ((x Z)) Z (- x))
(define-fun |Z.<=| ((x Z) (y Z)) B (<= x y))
(define-fun |Z.<| ((x Z) (y Z)) B (< x y))
(define-fun |Z.>| ((x Z) (y Z)) B (> x y))
(define-fun |Z.>=| ((x Z) (y Z)) B (>= x y))
(define-fun |Z.==| ((x Z) (y Z)) B (= x y))
(define-fun |Z.!=| ((x Z) (y Z)) B (not (= x y)))
(define-fun |Z.+| ((x Z) (y Z)) Z (+ x y))
(define-fun |Z.-| ((x Z) (y Z)) Z (- x y))
(define-fun |Z.*| ((x Z) (y Z)) Z (* x y))
(define-fun |Z./| ((x Z) (y Z)) Z (div x y))
(define-fun |Z.%| ((x Z) (y Z)) Z (mod x y))
(declare-fun |Z.randomSeed(Z)| (Z) Z)
(declare-fun |Z.randomSeedBetween(Z, Z, Z)| (Z Z Z) Z)
(declare-fun |B.randomSeed(Z)| (Z) B)

(declare-const |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message| Type)

(define-sort |SNG_Data_Model.Message| () ADT)

(define-sort S32 () (_ BitVec 32))
(define-fun |S32.toZ| ((x S32)) Z
  (ite (= ((_ extract 31 31) x) #b0)
       (bv2nat ((_ extract 30 0) x))
       (- (bv2nat ((_ extract 30 0) x)) 2147483648)))
(define-fun |S32.unary_-| ((x S32)) S32 (bvneg x))
(define-fun |S32.unary_~| ((x S32)) S32 (bvnot x))
(define-fun |S32.<=| ((x S32) (y S32)) B (bvsle x y))
(define-fun |S32.<| ((x S32) (y S32)) B (bvslt x y))
(define-fun |S32.>| ((x S32) (y S32)) B (bvsgt x y))
(define-fun |S32.>=| ((x S32) (y S32)) B (bvsge x y))
(define-fun |S32.==| ((x S32) (y S32)) B (= x y))
(define-fun |S32.!=| ((x S32) (y S32)) B (not (= x y)))
(define-fun |S32.+| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvadd x y))
(define-fun |S32.-| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvsub x y))
(define-fun |S32.*| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvmul x y))
(define-fun |S32./| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvsdiv x y))
(define-fun |S32.%| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvsrem x y))
(define-fun |S32.<<| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvshl x y))
(define-fun |S32.>>| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvashr x y))
(define-fun |S32.>>>| ((x S32) (y S32)) S32 (bvlshr x y))
(declare-fun |S32.randomSeed(Z)| (Z) S32)
(declare-fun |S32.randomSeedBetween(Z, S32, S32)| (Z S32 S32) S32)


(declare-datatypes ((|SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type| 0)) ((
  (|T:SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type.Public|) (|T:SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type.Restricted|) (|T:SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type.Critical|))))
(declare-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.ordinal| (|SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) Z)
(declare-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.name| (|SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) String)
(define-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.==| ((x |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) (y |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)) B (= x y))
(define-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.!=| ((x |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) (y |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)) B (not (= x y)))
(define-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.<=| ((x |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) (y |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)) B (<= (|SecurityLevel.Type.ordinal| x) (|SecurityLevel.Type.ordinal| y)))
(declare-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.randomSeed(Z)| (Z) |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)
(declare-fun |SecurityLevel.Type.randomSeedBetween(Z, SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type, SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type)| (Z |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type| |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)

(declare-const |e:SecurityLevel.Public| |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)

(assert (= |e:SecurityLevel.Public| |T:SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type.Public|))

(assert (= (|SecurityLevel.Type.ordinal| |e:SecurityLevel.Public|) 0))

(assert (= (|SecurityLevel.Type.name| |e:SecurityLevel.Public|) "Public"))

(declare-const |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted| |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)

(assert (= |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted| |T:SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type.Restricted|))

(assert (= (|SecurityLevel.Type.ordinal| |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted|) 1))

(assert (= (|SecurityLevel.Type.name| |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted|) "Restricted"))

(declare-const |e:SecurityLevel.Critical| |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)

(assert (= |e:SecurityLevel.Critical| |T:SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type.Critical|))

(assert (= (|SecurityLevel.Type.ordinal| |e:SecurityLevel.Critical|) 2))

(assert (= (|SecurityLevel.Type.name| |e:SecurityLevel.Critical|) "Critical"))

(assert (distinct |e:SecurityLevel.Public| |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted| |e:SecurityLevel.Critical|))

(assert (forall ((x |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)) (= (sub-type (type-of x) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (= (type-of x) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|))))


(declare-fun |Message.payload| (|SNG_Data_Model.Message|) S32)
(declare-fun |Message.security_level| (|SNG_Data_Model.Message|) |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|)
(declare-fun |Message.payload_=| (|SNG_Data_Model.Message| S32) |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(assert (forall ((x!0 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (x!1 S32) (x!2 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
  (=>
    (= (type-of x!2) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
    (= x!2 (|Message.payload_=| x!0 x!1))
    (and
      (= (type-of x!2) (type-of x!0))
      (= (|Message.payload| x!2) x!1)
      (= (|Message.security_level| x!2) (|Message.security_level| x!0))
    )
  )
))
(declare-fun |Message.security_level_=| (|SNG_Data_Model.Message| |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(assert (forall ((x!0 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (x!1 |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) (x!2 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
  (=>
    (= (type-of x!2) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
    (= x!2 (|Message.security_level_=| x!0 x!1))
    (and
      (= (type-of x!2) (type-of x!0))
      (= (|Message.payload| x!2) (|Message.payload| x!0))
      (= (|Message.security_level| x!2) x!1)
    )
  )
))
(declare-fun |Message.new| (S32 |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(assert (forall ((payload S32) (security_level |SNG_Data_Model.SecurityLevel.Type|) (x!0 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
  (=>
    (= x!0 (|Message.new| payload security_level))
    (and
      (= (type-of x!0) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
      (= (|Message.payload| x!0) payload)
      (= (|Message.security_level| x!0) security_level))
  )
))
(define-fun |Message.==| ((x!0 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (x!1 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)) B
  (and
    (= (type-of x!0) (type-of x!1) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
    (|S32.==| (|Message.payload| x!0) (|Message.payload| x!1))
    (|SecurityLevel.Type.==| (|Message.security_level| x!0) (|Message.security_level| x!1))))
(assert (forall ((x |SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (y |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)) (=> (= (type-of x) (type-of y) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (= x y) (|Message.==| x y))))
(assert (forall ((x |SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (y |SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
  (=>
    (= (type-of x) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
    (= (type-of y) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
    (|Message.==| x y)
    (= x y))))
(define-fun |Message.!=| ((x |SNG_Data_Model.Message|) (y |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)) B (not (|Message.==| x y)))



(declare-fun |GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(Message)| (ADT) B)


(assert (forall ((|l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel| |SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
  (=>
    (= (type-of |l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel|) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
    (and
      (forall ((cx!15 B))
        (=>
          (and
            (|SecurityLevel.Type.==| (|Message.security_level| |l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel|) |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted|)
            (= cx!15 true))
          (= cx!15 (|GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(Message)| |l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel|))))
      (forall ((cx!14 B))
        (=>
          (and
            (not (|SecurityLevel.Type.==| (|Message.security_level| |l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel|) |e:SecurityLevel.Restricted|))
            (= cx!14 (|SecurityLevel.Type.==| (|Message.security_level| |l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel|) |e:SecurityLevel.Public|)))
          (= cx!14 (|GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(Message)| |l:m:GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel|))))))))

(declare-const cx!1 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(declare-const |g:output| |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(assert (= (type-of |g:output|) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
(declare-const cx!2 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(declare-const |g:input| |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(assert (= (type-of |g:input|) |T:SNG_Data_Model.Message|))
(declare-const cx!3 B)
(declare-const cx!5 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(declare-const cx!16 B)
(declare-const cx!4 B)
(declare-const cx!17 |SNG_Data_Model.Message|)
(declare-const cx!18 B)
(declare-const cx!19 B)

(assert (= cx!1 |g:output|))
(assert (= cx!2 |g:input|))
(assert (= cx!3 (|Message.==| cx!1 cx!2)))
(assert (ite cx!3
          (and
            (= cx!5 |g:output|)
            (= cx!16 (|GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(Message)| cx!5)))
          true
        ))
(assert (= cx!4 (ite cx!3 cx!16 false)))
(assert (= cx!17 |g:input|))
(assert (= cx!18 (|GumboLib.GUMBO__Library.allowedSecurityLevel(Message)| cx!17)))
(assert (= cx!19 (|B.__>:| cx!4 cx!18)))
(assert (not cx!19))

(check-sat)
(exit)
